text.title: Vendor Management Pm Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Vendor Management Pm methodology end-to-end.

step.name: confirm-applies-if
step.input: Task description + Applies-If / Skip-If clauses from AGENTS.md
step.action: Verify every Applies-If condition holds AND no Skip-If condition fires. If unsure, ask the operator before proceeding.
step.output: Boolean: methodology applies / does not apply
step.decision-gate: If does-not-apply, STOP. Route to the correct methodology.

step.name: gather-typed-inputs
step.action: Collect each prerequisite as a typed, sourced value. Reject any free-form prose without a source citation.

step.name: apply-rules
step.action: For each rule in 01-core-rules, evaluate against the inputs map. Record pass/fail with the cited input value.
step.decision-gate: If any HIGH-severity rule fails, surface the gap; do not synthesize an output.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.action: Fill the template. Use the allowed-transformations from content/02-output-contract.xml when trimming prose. The spec type drives which template variant is used.

step.name: validate-and-register
step.action: Run the validator. Resolve every violation. Bump version + last_reviewed. Surface 'ready for owner review' flag.
step.output: Signed artefact registered in the decision store; appears in the index for downstream consumers.
